_comment: Machine-readable state for Clent Jewell's finance automation kit. Updated by update_workbook.py at the end of every weekly run. Do not hand-edit balances without also updating as_at and source.

obligations_calendar.description: School fees (quarterly) — full amount / Clent's 50% share
BAS lodgement/payment — Q4 FY26 (Apr-Jun 2026), Jewell Group Pty Ltd, agent-lodged via TWB
obligations_calendar.notes: Agent-lodgement concession date (NOT the 28-Jul self-lodger date). Nicole reconciles Xero to 30 Jun; Damian/TWB lodges. Standing cycle from Q1 FY27: 25-Nov, 28-Feb, 26-May, 25-Aug. Amount TBC from Xero/accountant each cycle.

obligations_calendar.description: PAYG instalment — Jewell Investment Group Pty Ltd (JIG)
obligations_calendar.notes: ATO-issued instalment notice (self-lodger dates: 28-Oct, 28-Feb, 28-Apr, 28-Jul), separate from BAS lodgement above and a different entity. Q4 FY26 confirmed $0.00 by Louis 9 Jul 2026. Jewell Group Pty Ltd's own PAYG/activity-statement status not yet confirmed directly in ATO Online Services — see Asana task 1216413618144620 (Lizelle).
Estimated date; confirm with conveyancer/solicitor as it approaches
Month is known (Aug 2026); exact date/amount TBC
Get exact date and minimum repayment figure from accountant; do not assume $0 risk

base_burns._comment: Averages from FY27 conservative base (workbook Cashflow). Personal incl. rent 3500 post-sale, 50% school fees, health, living, discretionary. Business = confirmed income minus expenses.

div7a.note: Repaid via transfer to JIG after house settlement; accountant-agreed; no FY27 cashflow line.

taxes_committed.note: Prior-year committed; PAYG instalments on hold.

child_support._comment: Sierra & Kyah 50/50 shared-cost ledger, tab 'Child Support — S&K'. Louis (accounts@jewellprojects.com) departs 2026-07-28; Liz (lizelle@jewellprojects.com) takes over as the operator who promotes approved claims to the paid ledger (Nicole-led handover; see LIZ-ONBOARDING.md).
child_support.former_operator_note: Louis's mailbox -- he departs 2026-07-28. Mailbox decided: Liz takes over (Ronnie shared credentials 2026-07-09), see CONTROLLER.md / controller.accounts_mailbox.

disputes.note: Matina claims unpaid; INV#188810 paid 7 May 2026 (Louis confirmed). Send proof.

child_support.automation: Weekly routine LLM-extracts new matinajewell@proton.me claims, reconciles vs ledger, appends to the tab's INBOX-TO-APPROVE queue (cols W+, rows 28+). NEVER auto-post to the paid ledger — Liz approves and promotes (see LIZ-ONBOARDING.md).

forecast_vs_actual._comment: Tab 'Forecast vs Actual FY27'. Forecast rows link live from Cashflow. Actual rows filled weekly.
forecast_vs_actual.business_actuals_source: Xero P&L month-to-date, mapped to sections: Business Income, Contractors, Subscriptions, Operating, Business Tax.
forecast_vs_actual.personal_actuals_source: Manual / bank categorisation — no clean feed; leave blank unless entered.
forecast_vs_actual.invoice_status_rule: Only Xero invoices in Awaiting Payment status feed forecast income -- never drafts or quotes. Quotes/pipeline visibility lives in the dedicated pipeline row (CRM/Asana, Ronnie). Decided 2026-07-09.

controller._comment: Controller/bookkeeper operating parameters. See CONTROLLER.md for full narrative context (RACI, control rules, escalation matrix, transition plan). Louis (accounts@jewellprojects.com) departs day-to-day 2026-07-28 and owns the Q4 FY26 BAS until then (Nicole reconciles Xero to 30 Jun); Nicole (his boss, previous bookkeeper) runs the handover and trains Liz via screen-share/video from 2026-07-13. Both Louis and Nicole shift to reduced-capacity overwatch after 28 Jul (scope/rate TBD). First AI-prepared BAS: Q1 FY27 (October 2026 run). The accounts@jewellprojects.com mailbox is decided: Liz takes over (2026-07-09).

thresholds._comment: business_cash_* used by DAILY-PULSE.md against Xero get_cash_position. approval_threshold: any NEW payee, or any payment >this amount outside approved_recurring_payees, needs Clent's explicit OK before Liz pays (CONTROLLER.md rule 2).

approved_recurring_payees.note: Liz is both the payments executor and a payee here. NAB dual-authorisation was considered and DECLINED by Clent (2026-07-08); the compensating control is the >$1,000/new-payee written-approval rule -- see CONTROLLER.md rule 5.
Rao also invoices ~$110/fortnight via Payoneer per timesheet -- separate rail, check both.

approved_recurring_payees.source: Cashflow Budget FY27 tab, Subscriptions section
Cashflow Budget FY27 tab, Operating section

clent.role: Owner -- approves exceptions, new payees, anything >approval_threshold outside the recurring list
clent.note: Overseas in Thailand through Jun-27; email-only reachability assumed.

damian.role: External accountant, TWB Chartered Accountants -- reviews & lodges quarterly BAS, annual tax, ASIC agent

matina.role: Co-parent -- raises child-support claims for Sierra & Kyah via the approval queue

louis.owns: Q4 FY26 BAS (prep + lodgement with Damian/TWB, due 2026-08-25 -- agent-lodgement date, not the 28-Jul self-lodger date) + handover questions
louis.note: After 2026-07-28: no longer active day-to-day. Duties pass to Liz (execution/triage) + AI controller (prep) per CONTROLLER.md RACI. Shifts to reduced-capacity overwatch alongside Nicole (scope/rate TBD with Clent), expected to ramp back up when income recovers -- decided in principle 2026-07-09. Mailbox decided: Liz takes over accounts@jewellprojects.com (Ronnie shared credentials 2026-07-09) -- see controller.accounts_mailbox.

nicole.role: Q4 FY26 BAS reconciliation (to 30 Jun) + Liz's trainer (screen-share/video, from 13 Jul 2026)
nicole.status: handover through 2026-07-28, then reduced-capacity overwatch (scope/rate TBD)
nicole.note: Louis's boss, the previous bookkeeper. Trains Liz via screen-share/video sessions (Liz is in the Philippines) on Xero reconciliation + payments, starting 13 Jul 2026. From 28 Jul 2026 shifts to reduced-capacity overwatch rather than fully exiting -- decided in principle 2026-07-09, scope/rate TBD -- expected to ramp back up when income recovers.

lizelle.role: payments executor + Xero reconciliation (in training via Nicole-led handover; takes over from 2026-07-28 with AI support)
lizelle.note: Known as Liz; Asana user Lizelle Vertera. Identity confirmed by Clent 8 Jul 2026.
lizelle.name: Lizelle Vertera

daily.note: Fires weekday mornings AEST (UTC+10/11 offset baked into the hour -- verify against current AEST/AEDT if this drifts).

quarterly.note: ~early Nov/Feb/May/Aug, ~3 weeks ahead of TWB's agent-lodgement BAS deadline (25 Nov/28 Feb/26 May/25 Aug) -- NOT the ATO self-lodger dates. Not a live trigger (Clent declined creating this one, 2026-07-08) -- run on demand until reconsidered.

annual.note: ~8 July, shortly after 30 Jun FY close.

finance_hub._comment: Liz's single support system -- see CONTROLLER.md 'Liz's Finance Hub' and LIZ-ONBOARDING.md 'Where to get help'.
finance_hub.handbook_drive_copy: Shared Drive finance folder -- re-upload whenever LIZ-ONBOARDING.md changes
finance_hub.worklist: Asana LIVE -- 'Jewell - Finance Board 2026' gid 1211856632158167; Lizelle gid 1210434221636262; handover checklist + chases + meeting actions assigned with due dates (8-9 Jul 2026)
finance_hub.questions_channel_caveat: Liz added to the channel 9 Jul 2026 (confirmed via member list). Topic text is stale (still reads 'no Liz access') -- cosmetic only, Clent to update manually when convenient.
finance_hub.escalation_ladder: handbook -> #sam-financial-controller (AI coaching answer next weekday morning or sooner) -> urgent/money-moving: WhatsApp/call Clent directly

accounts_mailbox.owner_from: 2026-07-09 (Lizelle, via Ronnie credential share; shared with Nicole/Louis until 2026-07-28, sole after)
accounts_mailbox.purpose: supplier invoices, Xero notifications, Hubdoc receipt pipeline
accounts_mailbox.known_issue: runaway re-forwarding loop Jun-Jul 2026 — Lizelle to fix by 22 Jul (Asana task)

hubdoc_routing.status: accounts@ forwards exist but loop; clent@ personal inbox NOT yet auto-forwarding
hubdoc_routing.action: Gmail filter needed on clent@ — see LIZ-ONBOARDING.md 'Receipts to Hubdoc' section; AI cannot create Gmail filters (no API tool) — one-time manual setup

playbook_reconciliation.purpose: weekly sweep reconciling real-world decisions back into these docs
sources: Circleback meetings (SearchMeetings/ReadMeetings -- intent+pageIndex required; meetingIds are strings)
Gmail fact-change hits from the weekly sweep
playbook_reconciliation.rule: never auto-override an explicit Clent decision in the Decisions log -- flag instead

nicole_louis_overwatch_rate.note: Applied to Cashflow Budget FY27 row 59 (Bookkeeping): $200 Jul-26, $50/mo Aug-26 to Jun-27. Verified recompute: Oct-1 forecast NW $1,117,483.04, Aug-26 close $2,517.96, Jun-27 close $261,237.48.

liz_slack_access.note: Clent added Lizelle to #sam-financial-controller directly -- confirmed via slack_list_channel_members (3 members: clent, ronnie, lizelle). Channel topic text is stale (still says 'no Liz access') but is cosmetic only; no MCP tool can edit a Slack topic.

slack_channel_duplication.recommendation: Archive #sam-finance-and-investment (redundant with #sam-financial-controller). Keep the other three. No MCP tool can archive a channel -- human action.
